race.comment: FLUFFY'S GIRL (4) hit the frame two starts ago at Devonport Synthetic but a little below best last time when sixth there., Freshened and despite the wide draw will take catching. Nicely placed to bounce back. MISS KEEDS (2) beat FLUFFY'S GIRL two back then was competitive last time when fourth there last time. Goes very well at this journey, boasting four wins from eight starts and is sure to play a big role. ZULU FIELDS (10) continues to race well including a win last time out to score by a nose over 1200m at this track. Leading player again. TASSIE POWER (3) was prominent at the bend and finished third last time over 1200m at this track when resuming from a spell, beaten 1.75 lengths. Will trim down second-up. Placed to advantage so expect another bold run. VOLKANOVSKI (7) next best.
